skills: functional language - appropriate response to a situation
data interpretation - bar chart / pictograph reading
map reading - directions and spatial prepositions
cloze reading - short narrative passage with 5 blanks
grammar: question words (which, what, who, where, how)
modal verbs (should, would, could, can, may)
question_types: single-sentence stem + 4-choice picture or text options
picture-based 'what is true / what do you say' items
data set (bar chart / map) with 2-5 linked questions
short poster/passage with 5 linked comprehension questions
cloze passage with 5 numbered blanks, 4-choice vocabulary each
reading_patterns: short informational poster (event: date, time, activity, prize) followed by 5 questions (date format, location, categorization, duration, who-qualifies)
short narrative/procedural passage (~80-100 words) with 5 cloze blanks testing verb/noun vocabulary in sequence
dialogue_patterns: two-line exchange: greeting/situation cue -> choose appropriate reply
situational prompt (no dialogue) -> choose the most appropriate thing to say
distractor_patterns: same-polarity but wrong social register (e.g. overly formal/informal reply)
answer restates the question instead of responding to it
plausible action but wrong location/context inferred from picture
numeric distractors: off-by-one category swap in chart-reading questions
date/number distractors testing correct English date-format ordering vs. correct content
answer_logic: sign/notice items: answer must restate the prohibition/instruction in different words, not the literal sign text
chart/map items: answer requires cross-referencing 2+ data points (e.g. 'more than X but less than Y')
dialogue items: correct reply must match both the grammatical question type (yes/no vs wh-) and topical continuity of the following line
cloze passage: each blank is resolved by nearby collocation/context, not distant passage themes
notes: Extracted from native embedded PDF text via pdftotext. Structure: items 1-25 standalone/linked-set (phonics, pictures, signs, charts, map, poster), items 26-40 dialogues + cloze passage.
